title: MNNIT Allahabad Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow, Field Assistant Posts
org: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad)
shortInfo: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad) Junior Research Fellow / Field Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website of MNNIT Allahabad. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow / Field Assistant Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: MNNIT Allahabad Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow, Field Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad)
basic_details.short_information: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad) Junior Research Fellow / Field Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website of MNNIT Allahabad. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow / Field Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Junior Research Fellow: Max 32 years, Field Assistant: Max 30 years
age_limit.details: Junior Research Fellow: Maximum 32 years Field Assistant: Maximum 30 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree in Civil Engineering and M. Tech degree Or Diploma/ Graduate Degree in Civil Engineering and Technology or equivalent
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: Graduate Degree in Civil Engineering and M. Tech degree in Structural Engineering or equivalent and must have qualified GATE/ NET or any national level examination conducted by central government departments or institutes like DST, IIT, ISRO etc. Field Assistant: Three-year Diploma/ Graduate Degree in Civil Engineering and Technology or equivalent.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 31,000/- (Consolidated) Per Month Field Assistant: Rs. 18,000/- (Consolidated) Per Month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MNNIT Allahabad Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MNNIT Allahabad recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow / Field Assistant posts is 01-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Research Fellow and Field Assistant?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies, with 1 for Junior Research Fellow and 1 for Field Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellow position, a Graduate Degree in Civil Engineering and an M. Tech degree in Structural Engineering or equivalent with GATE/NET qualification is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Field Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Field Assistant post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 31,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting based on merit, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for MNNIT Allahabad recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for MNNIT Allahabad recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section in this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Junior Research Fellow and Field Assistant are contractual.
